Before doing anything in this project, read AI_MASTER.md 
in the project root and follow its mandatory startup flow completely.
Do not write any code until you have finished reading all files 
listed in AI_MASTER.md's startup flow.

Continuity requirements (mandatory):
- Use repo-owned continuity docs (not chat memory): `PROGRESS.md`, `AUDIT_LOG.md`, `SCRATCHPAD.md`.
- If you stop mid-task, write exact resume instructions into `SCRATCHPAD.md`.
- After each task/session, update:
  - `PROGRESS.md`
  - `AUDIT_LOG.md` (append-only; use `AGENT_SESSION_TEMPLATE.md`, include required `SESSION_ID`)
